events.name: Registration
events.description:
Team Registration & breakfast.
Atleast one member from a team must be present for registration.

events.name: Event briefing
events.description: Networking among participants, judge introductions, and event briefing: rules and marking schemes.

events.name: Hackathon Begins
events.description:
With problem statement or event's theme released right at 8:00 AM, the hackathon begins. Participants will have 7 hours to work on their projects.
Tired of coding? Take a break and maybe play some games. Roam around the college. Help your self with rasna/tang and coffee available thorughout the day.
Mentors will be making rounds to check on every teams and help them with their projects. They will guide you to a right path if you found yourself lost.

events.name: Time to wrap up
events.description:
Prepare to wrap up your project. Make sure to submit your whole work's zip file before 3:30 PM in google classroom link provided to each team leader at the start of event.
Immediately call a voulnteer if you are facing any issues with submission.

events.name: Top 10 teams announcement
events.description: Exactly at 3PM, top 10 teams will be announced based on Mentor Evaluation. At this time, its better if one or two members of the 10 qualified teams start preparing for pitching & demostration. Presentation must contain two slides: 'Teams Name + Project Name' and 'The Problem we Identified'.

events.name: Time's Up
events.description: By 3:30 PM, The laptop that will be used for the final presentaion and project demo must be submitted to the volunteers. No changes can be made to the project or ppt from different device after this time.

events.name: Pitching
events.description: Top 10 teams pitch their project to the judges. Each team gets total 5 minutes for presentation and project demo. Followed by a 5 minutes Q&A session.

events.name: Closing Ceremony
events.description: Token of love for judges and mentors. Winners won't be announced that day.
